chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: The escort flag vehicle requirements provided by Section 623.099 (Escort Flag Vehicle) apply to the movement of portable building units and compatible cargo under this subchapter as if such building units and cargo were a manufactured house.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.129 — Escort Flag Vehicle

The escort flag vehicle requirements provided by Section 623.099 (Escort Flag Vehicle) apply to the movement of portable building units and compatible cargo under this subchapter as if such building units and cargo were a manufactured house.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 487, Sec. 2, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.text: The escort flag vehicle requirements provided by Section 623.099 (Escort Flag Vehicle) apply to the movement of portable building units and compatible cargo under this subchapter as if such building units and cargo were a manufactured house.
